personal.name: Jim Alejandro Caicedo Osorio
personal.title: iOS Developer
personal.summary: iOS Developer specialized in Swift and SwiftUI with practical experience building end-to-end mobile applications. Strong foundation in MVVM architecture, RESTful API integration, and Clean Architecture principles. Passionate about mobile development and continuous technical growth.

experience.description: Participated in internal mobile development training program focused on iOS application architecture and best practices.
highlights: Developed an iOS movie browsing application using Swift and SwiftUI
Implemented MVVM architecture for scalable and maintainable code structure
Integrated RESTful APIs using URLSession and handled JSON parsing with Codable
Applied Clean Architecture principles and version control with Git

experience.description: Development of CheckMovies, an iOS application built to practice real-world mobile architecture and API consumption.
highlights: Managed asynchronous data loading with async/await
Implemented error handling and state management

experience.description: Designed and developed an interactive 3D developer portfolio to showcase software projects.
highlights: Optimized performance and structured reusable components

projects.name: CheckMovies iOS App
projects.description: Movie browsing iOS application built with SwiftUI following MVVM architecture and API integration.

projects.name: Interactive 3D Developer Portfolio
projects.description: Personal interactive portfolio featuring 3D environment and CV visualizer.
